observable_contrast: Euclidean norm of frozen-protocol lower-symbol difference S(theta_high)-S(theta_low)

admissible_calibrations.description: M4 per-channel additive offsets fitted only on the regular anchor
per-channel slopes in [0.9,1.1], offsets chosen to preserve the regular anchor target

error_budget.symbol_error: maximum absolute target mismatch on the 33-point path grid for each geometry and calibration

decision_rule.global_margin: minimum per-case margin over both geometries and all admissible calibrations
decision_rule.p1_pilot_authorized: global_margin > 0 and upstream operator-level nuisance and wall gates pass

claim_firewall: A detected differential response is not sufficient if it is not separated from finite-spin symbol mismatch.
The regular calibration geometry cannot by itself authorize P1.
Grid maxima and minima are not continuum extrema.
A negative certificate is a valid programme outcome.
